sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 65 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection NO. 27. 2. For order on CMA No. 658/2024 (Exp) 3. For hearing of main case. 27.11.2025 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate for applicant. Per learned counsel, questions proposed are squarely covered by the Supreme Court’s judgment in the case of Millat Tractors Limited, Lahore reported as 2024 SCMR 700, therefore, he seeks this reference to be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
